title: Rock-color Silk Road animation
content: Overall style requirements: rock color graphic animation, Oriental and Silk Road decorative aesthetics, mineral pigment texture, cinnabar red, ochre, stone green, aquamarine, gold embellishment, paper and mural texture, plane layering, no real photography, no 3D realism. The rhythm of the picture is from static to dynamic, and then from dynamic to quiet, highlighting the sense of journey and abundance from "land to cup", cheerful music, Western Regions style. Shot 1: The branches appear, and the rich opening (0-4 seconds) On the paper of the Silk Road painting, ochre and scarlet blocks are blurred, and a pomegranate branch spreads out from the right side of the picture, with thick leaves and obvious layers of mineral pigments. A full pomegranate on the branch slowly appears, with a red and golden shell and a round and quiet outline. Sunlight falls on the peel with golden round spots and broken gold foil, and the surface of the pomegranate is warm and shiny, like a fruit that has been ripe by time. The opening temperament is rich and restrained. Shot 2: Take it off gently and the journey begins (4-7 seconds) The pomegranate was gently plucked by a maid from the Western Regions, with smooth and elegant movements. Curly grass patterns, ancient patterns and decorative long scrolls gradually emerged in the background, suggesting that it came from a distant land. The picture transitioned from static branches to the unfolding of the journey, and mountains, roads and towns began to be laid out in the background, like a long silk road scroll slowly being opened. Shot 3: Crossing ancient roads and crossing mountains and rivers (7-13 seconds) The silhouettes of the camel caravan moved slowly forward, the bells expressed the rhythm with tiny golden dots, and the pomegranates appeared in the camel's backpack. The ancient road passed through the dunes, oases and city gates, the wind and sand swept in flowing patterns, and the road traced by the golden thread continued to extend into the distance. The colors were strong and high-end, like silk road murals and rock color illustrations fused together. The pomegranate was always bright and full on the long road, like preserving the sunshine, heat and abundance of a distant land to this day. Shot 4: The transition from ancient to modern, arriving at the present moment (13-16 seconds) The ancient patterns and architectural outlines in the background are gradually simplified, and time quietly transitions to modern space. The pomegranate is placed on the modern countertop, and the desktop and utensils are presented in a simple plane geometry. The ancient and modern visuals are connected in the same picture, and the rhythm of the picture changes from "far travel" to "arrival". Shot 5: Cut into the pomegranate, visual climax (16-20 seconds) One hand gently cut the pomegranate, the movement was slow and restrained, and the moment the peel cracked was very ceremonial. Shot 6: Squeezed into juice, flowing abundantly (20-24 seconds) The seeds entered the vessel and were pressed into a rich pomegranate juice, the liquid flowing in a deep red and transparent texture with delicate rock-colored particles. The pomegranate juice was slowly poured into the modern glass, the outline of the glass was clear and concise, the red liquid was raised in the cup, and the surface was slightly rippled and highlighted. A few ice cubes fell into the cup, the cold white and dark red contrasted sharply, and fine water droplets appeared on the wall of the cup, and the refreshing feeling was filled. Shot 7: Modern drinking, the journey lands (24-27 seconds) The background cuts into the modern life scene, and the window light, tabletop, fabric and plants maintain a flat decorative and warm color scheme. The juice cup is placed in the center of the picture, and the patterns of ancient roads, camel caravans and city gates are vaguely superimposed around it, suggesting that the juice comes from a long journey. The atmosphere is rich, warm and quiet. Shot 8: Time Convergence, Poster Closure (27-30 seconds) The ancient road patterns in the background gradually merge with the modern space, like time converging in this glass of juice. The picture briefly flashes back to the branches of pomegranates, ancient road camel shadows and red grains, forming a complete circuit "from the land to the cup". Finally, the bouquet is formed into an advertising poster composition: the dark red and rich pomegranate juice is placed in the center, next to the cup is a cracked pomegranate, and the ancient road patterns, golden light spots and modern life elements are superimposed around it. The picture is quiet but full of vitality, like a journey across time and land that finally arrives at the moment. The advertising slogan "seedance, a gift from the Western Regions".
